suggestion.rationale: The three records correspond to distinct Community Board 3 entities in different boroughs (Brooklyn, Bronx, Staten Island). Per the Identity Merge Canon's contradiction test, differing borough (a strong identity field) prevents merge. The shared entity_name 'Community Board 3' is a weak alias that does not override the borough distinction. No merge groups apply across borough lines. All cross-record pairs are do_not_merge.
